response.title: Sprint Planning Notes
response.content:
# Sprint 12 Planning

## Goals
- Ship the editor with real-time autosave
- Add markdown preview toggle
- Integrate AI summary generation

## Action Items
- [ ] Design share dialog with permission roles
- [ ] Implement Convex search indexes
- [ ] Add weekly activity sparkline to dashboard
response.aiSummary: Sprint 12 planning focused on shipping the editor with autosave, markdown preview, and AI summaries. Key tasks include designing the share dialog and implementing search.

response.title: Research: Vector Databases
response.content:
# Vector Database Comparison

Looking at Pinecone vs Weaviate vs Chroma for semantic search.

**Pinecone** — managed, scales well, $$$
**Weaviate** — open-source, GraphQL API
**Chroma** — lightweight, Python-first
